faq.title: Common Questions
faq.a1: Your privacy is our highest priority. All data, especially your practice exercises and communication with your partner, is encrypted. We do not sell your data.
faq.q2: Can I use {brand} alone, or do I need my partner?
faq.a2: The platform is designed primarily for couples to connect, but individuals can still benefit significantly from the educational library and solo self-discovery exercises.
faq.q3: Is the content created by professionals?
faq.a3: Yes, our content is authored and reviewed by licensed therapists, sex educators, and psychologists to ensure it is science-backed and safe.
faq.a4: One partner initiates an exercise (e.g., a questionnaire about desires), answers their part privately, and invites the other. Answers are only revealed when both partners have completed it, creating a safe, no-pressure environment.
faq.q5: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faq.a5: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. You'll retain access to premium features until the end of your current billing cycle.
faq.q6: How does the Couples plan work?
faq.a6: The Couples plan allows you to link two {brand} accounts. Both users get full Premium access, plus exclusive features like shared timelines, dual assessments, and joint exercises.
faq.q7: Is my data private and secure?
faq.a7: Absolutely. Your intimacy data and practice notes are highly protected. We use industry-standard encryption for all your personal information.

about.title: About {brand}
about.subtitle: Your Private Sanctuary for Connection
about.missionText: {brand} was founded with a single purpose: to provide couples with a safe, science-backed, and private space to explore and deepen their connection. We believe that intimate wellness is a fundamental pillar of a healthy relationship.
about.v1Text: Your most intimate moments deserve the highest level of security. We use state-of-the-art encryption to ensure your data remains yours alone.
about.v2Text: Our content and exercises are developed in collaboration with relationship experts and psychologists.
about.v3Text: We design with care, understanding the vulnerability involved in the journey of connection.
about.approachText: By combining artificial intelligence with proven relationship psychology, we provide personalized guidance that adapts to your unique dynamic.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: At {brand}, your privacy is our core value. This policy outlines how we handle your data and the measures we take to protect your sanctuary.
privacyPage.s1Text: We collect minimal data necessary to provide our services. This includes your account information and usage patterns. Your intimate notes and AI conversations are encrypted.
privacyPage.s2Text: Your data is used solely to personalize your experience and improve our platform. We never sell your personal information to third parties.
privacyPage.s3Text: You have the right to access, export, and delete your data at any time through your account settings.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: By using {brand}, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully to understand your rights and responsibilities.
termsPage.s1Text: {brand} is intended for adults. You agree to use the platform respectfully and for its intended purpose of wellness and connection.
termsPage.s2Text: Premium features are available through subscription. You can cancel at any time, and you will retain access until the end of your billing period.
termsPage.s3Text: {brand} provides educational content and is not a substitute for professional medical or therapeutic advice.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: We're here to help you on your journey.
contactPage.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
contactPage.supportQuote: We believe in human-to-human connection. Our team reads every message and responds personally within 48 hours.

footer.tagline: Your private sanctuary for connection. Explore, understand, and elevate your intimate life together.
footer.love: Made with care for your connection

privacy.confirmList2: Removal of all shared journal entries
privacy.confirmList4: Immediate cancellation of any active subscription
